UNIVERSITY OF SWAT
Office of the Directorate of Administration
Complete Bus Route & Fare Information — April 2025
Administration Block, Main Campus, Charbagh, Swat | Phone: (0946) 920855 | www.uswat.edu.pk

All fares in Pakistani Rupees (PKR). One Side = single journey. Two Side = return journey. Total Amount = full semester fee
